requirement_topic.en: PNEE Energy Efficiency Label — Air-conditioners and Heat Pumps (ANRE Direction)
requirement_topic.zh: PNEE能效标签——空调器与热泵（ANRE方向）
requirement_topic.zht: PNEE能效標籤——空調器與熱泵（ANRE方向）

summary.en: Morocco's Autorité Nationale de Régulation de l'Electricité (ANRE) publishes energy efficiency labelling and minimum energy performance direction under the Plan National pour l'Efficacité Energétique (PNEE). Air-conditioners and heat pumps placed on the Moroccan market are expected to carry energy efficiency class markings aligned to the PNEE labelling format, which follows the EU energy label structure (A-to-G or A+++-to-D classes depending on the applicable PNEE notice). Declared efficiency metrics — primarily EER and COP, or SEER and SCOP for seasonal-rated products — must reflect test conditions applicable to the Moroccan climate context and be documented in French or Arabic in sales and import paperwork. ANRE periodically updates PNEE category coverage and label format; importers must confirm the current notice for room air-conditioners and heat pumps before placement on market.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥国家电力监管局（ANRE）依据国家能源效率计划（PNEE）发布能效标签和最低能效性能方向。在摩洛哥市场销售的空调器和热泵应按照PNEE标签格式（按适用的PNEE通知，采用A至G或A+++至D等级，与欧盟能效标签结构对标）标注能效等级。申报效率指标——主要为EER和COP，或季节能效比SEER和SCOP——须反映适用于摩洛哥气候条件的测试工况，并在销售和进口文件中以法语或阿拉伯语记录。ANRE定期更新PNEE类别覆盖范围和标签格式；进口商在产品入市前须确认房间空调和热泵的最新通知。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥國家電力監管局（ANRE）依據國家能源效率計劃（PNEE）發布能效標籤和最低能效性能方向。在摩洛哥市場銷售的空調器和熱泵應按照PNEE標籤格式（按適用的PNEE通知，採用A至G或A+++至D等級，與歐盟能效標籤結構對標）標注能效等級。申報效率指標——主要為EER和COP，或季節能效比SEER和SCOP——須反映適用於摩洛哥氣候條件的測試工況，並在銷售和進口文件中以法語或阿拉伯語記錄。ANRE定期更新PNEE類別覆蓋範圍和標籤格式；進口商在產品入市前須確認房間空調和熱泵的最新通知。

standards_or_laws: PNEE (Plan National pour l'Efficacité Energétique) — ANRE energy label direction for air-conditioners
ANRE energy efficiency label notices for room AC and heat pumps
NM standards aligned to EN 14511 / EN 14825 for seasonal efficiency testing
Bulletin Officiel du Royaume du Maroc — relevant PNEE decrees

summary.en: China's China Energy Label (CEL) system and GB 21455 / GB 25454 set mandatory energy efficiency class declarations for room air-conditioners and heat pumps in the domestic market, using COP/SCOP metrics tested under GB/T 7725 test conditions. Chinese energy efficiency classes (Grade 1 to 5) and label format do not map directly to Morocco PNEE label classes or EU A-to-G notation. Chinese energy label documentation is domestic-market evidence and requires conversion and French/Arabic language adaptation for Moroccan sales documentation.
summary.zh: 中国能效标识（CEL）体系及GB 21455 / GB 25454规定了国内市场房间空调和热泵的强制能效等级声明，采用按GB/T 7725测试工况测量的COP/SCOP指标。中国能效等级（1至5级）和标签格式不能直接映射为摩洛哥PNEE标签等级或欧盟A至G标注。中国能效标识文件属国内市场证据，需转换并以法语或阿拉伯语进行适配，方可用于摩洛哥销售文件。
summary.zht: 中國能效標識（CEL）體系及GB 21455 / GB 25454規定了國內市場房間空調和熱泵的強制能效等級聲明，採用按GB/T 7725測試工況測量的COP/SCOP指標。中國能效等級（1至5級）和標籤格式不能直接映射為摩洛哥PNEE標籤等級或歐盟A至G標注。中國能效標識文件屬國內市場證據，需轉換並以法語或阿拉伯語進行適配，方可用於摩洛哥銷售文件。

standards_or_laws: China Energy Label (CEL) — mandatory domestic energy efficiency labelling
GB 21455 — minimum energy efficiency standard for room air-conditioners
GB 25454 — heat pump water heater energy efficiency
GB/T 7725 — room air-conditioner performance test method (COP/SCOP)

gap.en: Chinese energy efficiency labels and grade descriptors cannot be reused directly for Moroccan PNEE-compliant sales documentation. The efficiency metric definitions, test reference conditions, and label grade notation differ between the Chinese CEL system and the PNEE/EU-aligned Moroccan label. Product technical files must be adapted to PNEE format, with efficiency values retested or recalculated to EN 14511 / EN 14825 conditions where required, and sales documentation produced in French or Arabic.
gap.zh: 中国能效标识及等级描述不能直接用于摩洛哥PNEE合规销售文件。中国CEL体系与PNEE/欧盟对标的摩洛哥标签在效率指标定义、测试参考条件和标签等级标注方面存在差异。产品技术文件须适配PNEE格式，必要时按EN 14511 / EN 14825工况重新测试或换算效率数值，并以法语或阿拉伯语编制销售文件。
gap.zht: 中國能效標識及等級描述不能直接用於摩洛哥PNEE合規銷售文件。中國CEL體系與PNEE/歐盟對標的摩洛哥標籤在效率指標定義、測試參考條件和標籤等級標注方面存在差異。產品技術文件須適配PNEE格式，必要時按EN 14511 / EN 14825工況重新測試或換算效率數值，並以法語或阿拉伯語編製銷售文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where product category is covered by a current ANRE/PNEE energy label notice; confirm current notice scope before import
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in CN domestic market under China Energy Label regime; not equivalent to PNEE/Morocco label

source.publisher: Autorité Nationale de Régulation de l'Electricité (ANRE), Morocco

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — Chinese energy efficiency labels are not directly usable in Morocco; PNEE-compliant labelling, EN-aligned efficiency metrics, and French/Arabic documentation must be prepared for market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——中国能效标识不能直接在摩洛哥使用；入市前须准备符合PNEE要求的标签、EN对标效率指标及法语/阿拉伯语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——中國能效標識不能直接在摩洛哥使用；入市前須準備符合PNEE要求的標籤、EN對標效率指標及法語/阿拉伯語文件。

requirement_topic.en: Grid Voltage Adaptation and ONEE Connection Requirements — 230 V 50 Hz
requirement_topic.zh: 电网电压适配与ONEE并网要求——230 V 50 Hz
requirement_topic.zht: 電網電壓適配與ONEE並網要求——230 V 50 Hz

summary.en: Morocco's national grid, operated by ONEE (Office National de l'Electricité et de l'Eau Potable), supplies 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz for residential and commercial premises. Heat pumps and split air-conditioners imported for the Moroccan market must be rated and tested for operation at 230 V ±10 % and 50 Hz. ONEE connection requirements and wiring regulations govern installation of permanently connected appliances; installer qualifications and local earthing arrangements must comply with Moroccan electrical installation practice. Product nameplates and technical datasheets must state voltage and frequency in a form acceptable for Moroccan customs and safety inspection.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥国家电网由ONEE（国家水电局）运营，向居民和商业场所供应230V单相和400V三相50Hz电力。进入摩洛哥市场的热泵和分体空调须按230V ±10%、50Hz工况额定并测试。ONEE并网要求及配线规程管辖永久接线设备的安装；安装商资质和本地接地方式须符合摩洛哥电气安装规范。产品铭牌和技术规格书须以符合摩洛哥海关和安全检查要求的格式标注电压和频率。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥國家電網由ONEE（國家水電局）運營，向居民和商業場所供應230V單相和400V三相50Hz電力。進入摩洛哥市場的熱泵和分體空調須按230V ±10%、50Hz工況額定並測試。ONEE並網要求及配線規程管轄永久接線設備的安裝；安裝商資質和本地接地方式須符合摩洛哥電氣安裝規範。產品銘牌和技術規格書須以符合摩洛哥海關和安全檢查要求的格式標注電壓和頻率。

standards_or_laws: ONEE grid supply standard — 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz
Moroccan electrical installation regulations (NM aligned to IEC 60364 series)
NM IEC 60335-2-40 — voltage and frequency rating requirements for heat pumps

summary.en: China's domestic grid is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. Frequency is identical to Morocco at 50 Hz, which means no frequency conversion or derating is required for Chinese heat-pump products. However, the 220 V vs 230 V nominal voltage difference (approx. 4.5 %) requires product confirmation that the unit's rated voltage range covers 230 V ±10 %; most modern inverter-driven units are designed for 220–240 V and will comply, but this must be verified on the specific model. Chinese GB standards such as GB 25454 and GB/T 7725 use 220 V test reference conditions; efficiency figures may differ marginally at 230 V.
summary.zh: 中国国内电网为220V单相/380V三相50Hz。频率与摩洛哥相同（均为50Hz），无需频率转换或降额。但220V与230V额定电压差异（约4.5%）需确认产品额定电压范围涵盖230V ±10%；大多数现代变频机型设计适用于220–240V，通常可满足，但需对具体型号进行核实。中国GB标准（如GB 25454和GB/T 7725）采用220V测试参考工况；在230V下效率数值可能略有差异。
summary.zht: 中國國內電網為220V單相/380V三相50Hz。頻率與摩洛哥相同（均為50Hz），無需頻率轉換或降額。但220V與230V額定電壓差異（約4.5%）需確認產品額定電壓範圍涵蓋230V ±10%；大多數現代變頻機型設計適用於220–240V，通常可滿足，但需對具體型號進行核實。中國GB標準（如GB 25454和GB/T 7725）採用220V測試參考工況；在230V下效率數值可能略有差異。

standards_or_laws: China grid standard — 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz
GB 25454 — heat pump energy efficiency (220 V test conditions)
GB/T 7725 — room air-conditioner performance test (220 V reference)

gap.en: Frequency is aligned (50 Hz in both countries) — no frequency gap. The voltage nominal gap (220 V CN vs 230 V Morocco) is moderate; most modern inverter units rated 220–240 V will operate correctly, but suitability for 230 V ±10 % must be confirmed on the model datasheet and nameplate before export. Efficiency test data at 220 V may not exactly replicate at 230 V; where PNEE labelling requires 230 V test evidence, re-testing or documented voltage-adjustment analysis may be needed.
gap.zh: 频率一致（两国均为50Hz）——无频率差距。电压额定差异（中国220V对摩洛哥230V）较小；大多数额定220–240V的现代变频机型可正常运行，但须在出口前通过机型规格书和铭牌确认230V ±10%适用性。220V下的能效测试数据在230V时可能略有差异；如PNEE标签要求230V测试证据，可能需要重新测试或提供有据可查的电压调整分析。
gap.zht: 頻率一致（兩國均為50Hz）——無頻率差距。電壓額定差異（中國220V對摩洛哥230V）較小；大多數額定220–240V的現代變頻機型可正常運行，但須在出口前通過機型規格書和銘牌確認230V ±10%適用性。220V下的能效測試數據在230V時可能略有差異；如PNEE標籤要求230V測試證據，可能需要重新測試或提供有據可查的電壓調整分析。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — product must be rated and suitable for 230 V 50 Hz; ONEE connection requirements apply to permanently installed units
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for CN domestic market at 220 V 50 Hz; frequency identical but voltage nominal differs by approx. 4.5 %

source.publisher: Office National de l'Electricité et de l'Eau Potable (ONEE), Morocco

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Minor-to-moderate gap — 50 Hz frequency is identical to China; 230 V vs 220 V voltage nominal must be confirmed on the specific model datasheet before export, and PNEE energy label efficiency data must reflect 230 V test conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 较小至中等差距——50Hz频率与中国一致；出口前须通过具体机型规格书确认230V对220V电压额定的适用性，PNEE能效标签效率数据须反映230V测试工况。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 較小至中等差距——50Hz頻率與中國一致；出口前須通過具體機型規格書確認230V對220V電壓額定的適用性，PNEE能效標籤效率數據須反映230V測試工況。
